title: Hidyk's Realm
description: The best vanilla resource pack? Maybe...
body:
![Like vanilla, but much better?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81b3e1ab76d0fb7aa5d8ec77c9697609bf6d9442_0.webp)
### A fresh take on a familiar game
**HIDYK's REALM** takes the idea of vanilla to a new level, carefully balancing a huge number of changes with the familiar style, guaranteeing an unusual gaming experience.

***
![Most interesting part of Breath of Copper Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df83275579a2448e656d76692d02486f7080ba58.webp)
### Copper Shines in a Whole New Way!
This update has significantly bridged the gap between the resource pack and the developers, as it includes a lot of content from the latest versions of Minecraft. However, beyond the new features and “big picture” changes, it’s just as important to pay attention to the “smaller” details.
Download the update or read the changelog to learn everything about this update: for the last two versions, I’ve been trying to make the changelogs as detailed as possible so you can fully appreciate the scope of the changes.

![New blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fab363eac45956b22709558f501a8b3860b9b79_0.webp)
### How's that possible?
HIDYK's REALM focuses on supporting builders, so the appearance of many blocks is designed in such a way that buildings remain virtually unchanged after enabling the resource pack.\
The unique appearance of double slabs brings completely new building blocks to the game. Wildflowers can be exclusively white or yellow if you plant them at a certain angle. Block variations and improved texture detail, partly inspired by the style of Minecraft before 1.14, can rekindle your desire to build.

![Immersive interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e48b1816afdc3a732b79e4b8208a1c6be804c066.png)
### Immersive interface
All interfaces display the essence of the block to which they belong, which not only looks more detailed but also allows you to better feel the process of interacting with them. In addition, the colors chosen for each of them are well suited for playing at night and will not cause discomfort to your eyes.

[![Join our Discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14465585ad06c94409523b8aa384b95a11202f1d.png)](https://discord.gg/yE45K8zdzk)
### Become part of the [Community](https://discord.gg/yE45K8zdzk)
For over **5 years** now, this resource pack has continued to evolve, largely thanks to a small but very dedicated and active community of players. By joining our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/yE45K8zdzk), you gain access to the most convenient and comfortable environment with everything you need.\
Also, posts about development are published here earlier than on other social media!
***
### Important
Additional mods are required for the resource pack to work properly:
- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
### Terms of Use
I, Hidyk, as the author of the HIDYK's REALM resource pack, reserve the right to state that it may only be used for the purposes specified below:
- Personal use of the resource pack without publishing its files on third-party websites or other platforms
- Use of the resource pack in posts, articles, renders, etc., with official download links included
- Use of the resource pack in video, with official download links included
- Creating add-ons or any other resource packs using original or modified materials from HIDYK's REALM, with my authorship indicated in the “Members”, ‘Relations’ sections on CurseForge or in the “Creators”, “Dependencies” section on Modrtinth with a share of the income from downloads *(determined individually, during discussion)*
- Adding resource pack to modpacks, modifying or using its individual components for these purposes, with my authorship indicated in the “Members”, ‘Relations’ sections on CurseForge or in the “Creators”, “Dependencies” section on Modrtinth with a share of the income from downloads *(determined individually, during discussion)*

Thank you for your honesty and respect for my work. I hope you have a lot of fun playing with my resource packs! <3

If you want to support the development of HIDYK's REALM and my other projects, you can subscribe to [Boosty](https://boosty.to/hidyk). Each level offers different nice bonuses, one of which is access to early releases!
